title: 3D Hosti
description: Replaced 2D objects with 3D analogues for more convenient and volumetric display.
body:
**This resource pack replaces some 2D items and blocks with improved 3D models.**
Items that previously appeared as flat textures in the inventory and in hand are now displayed in full 3D with realistic shape and depth.

_✅ Fully compatible with other texture packs — **works seamlessly alongside packs from other creators.**_
